examples: Composition alone can't give you the answer to the question of why is the plywood superior to the solid pine board.
Which one has the superior mechanical properties? The plywood. Why?
No cheap-looking plywood box or precious playhouse on stilts would do.
He slept on a mattress with a plywood board underneath it so his spine wouldn't curve.
Made primarily of birch plywood (despite the nickname) it remains the largest plane ever flown.
